author: vincent18893
content:
Hello. Everyone.
I am an *Asian developer with 10 years of experience* in integrated development of AI, blockchain, hardware, and robotics.
I am currently seeking a partner in the U.S. or Europe to expand my development capabilities into the global market.👍
I will deliver my partner everything, and while some programming knowledge is desirable, it is not mandatory.
*Neither my partner nor I will work for free.*
Best.🙏
